name: codex-toys-remote-control
description: Operate remote Codex workspaces from a local Codex App over SSH.

interface.shortDescription: Use local Codex App remote connections for SSH-backed codex-toys.
interface.longDescription: codex-toys remote control installs hookless operator skills for a local Codex App to discover managed remote connections, run SSH-backed codex-toys commands against remote workspaces through `codex-toys toybox serve`, and start turns in remote workspaces.
defaultPrompt: Discover my Codex App remote connections and run codex-toys over SSH.
Check whether my remote codex-toys toybox is reachable.
Start a Codex turn in the remote workspace.
Build a local proxy dashboard for a remote workspace over SSH.
